utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan: (1) health_coverage is fully specified with provider, coverage type, benefits, and costs — fully covered. (2) property_coverage is marked 'Not applicable in this task', so not covered. (3) travel_coverage is explicitly 'Not included in this plan', so not covered. (4) additional_services are included with listed services and costs (the costs are implicit as 'Included', which is acceptable) — covered. (5) total_budget is fully specified with monthly, annual, and savings — covered. Therefore, 3 out of 5 items are included with full details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists 'PrimeCare' as the provider with 'Comprehensive (physical + mental + adventure sports)' coverage. In the ground-truth dataset, 'PrimeCare' corresponds to the 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' found under both physical_health and mental_health categories. The physical health version has a rating of 6, and the mental health version has a rating of 4. The assistant’s plan merges both as a single comprehensive plan, so we map both relevant ratings. No property or travel coverage is included, so only the PrimeCare health coverage is mapped.
